name: Bernadette Peters
abstract: Bernadette Peters (née Lazzara; born February 28, 1948) is an American actress and singer. Over a career spanning more than six decades, she has starred in musical theatre, television and film, performed in solo concerts and released recordings.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: And then Bernadette Peters, I got to work with her, I love Bernadette Peters, what a great singer she is.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
